title: Allegheny County Lifetime Dog Licenses — curated Data Dictionary
description: Curated dictionary for the viz smart gallery example. Tags OwnerZip as a geographic zip-code dimension (concept geo.zip_code) so viz smart draws a per-zip summary choropleth against the Allegheny County zip-boundary GeoJSON instead of a frequency bar. _id and DogName are tagged as identifiers (skipped); the low-cardinality categorical columns are omitted so they fall back to the statistical classifier (frequency bars).
